name: proc_creation_win_hktl_invoke_obfuscation_obfuscated_iex_commandline
raw_query: any where process.command_line like~ ("SigmaRegularExpression(regexp=SigmaString(['\\$PSHome\\[\\s', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_MULTI: 1>, '\\d{1,3}\\s', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_MULTI: 1>, '\\]\\s', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_MULTI: 1>, '\\+\\s', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_MULTI: 1>, '\\$PSHome\\[']), flags=set())", "SigmaRegularExpression(regexp=SigmaString(['\\$ShellId\\[\\s', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_MULTI: 1>, '\\d{1,3}\\s', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_MULTI: 1>, '\\]\\s', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_MULTI: 1>, '\\+\\s', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_MULTI: 1>, '\\$ShellId\\[']), flags=set())", "SigmaRegularExpression(regexp=SigmaString(['\\$env:Public\\[\\s', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_MULTI: 1>, '\\d{1,3}\\s', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_MULTI: 1>, '\\]\\s', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_MULTI: 1>, '\\+\\s', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_MULTI: 1>, '\\$env:Public\\[']), flags=set())", "SigmaRegularExpression(regexp=SigmaString(['\\$env:ComSpec\\[(\\s', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_MULTI: 1>, '\\d{1,3}\\s', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_MULTI: 1>, ',){2}']), flags=set())", "SigmaRegularExpression(regexp=SigmaString(['\\', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_MULTI: 1>, 'mdr\\', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_MULTI: 1>, '\\W\\s', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_MULTI: 1>, '\\)\\.Name']), flags=set())", "SigmaRegularExpression(regexp=SigmaString(['\\$VerbosePreference\\.ToString\\(']), flags=set())", "SigmaRegularExpression(regexp=SigmaString(['\\[String\\]\\s', <SpecialChars.WILDCARD_MULTI: 1>, '\\$VerbosePreference']), flags=set())")
